content:
there are cycles in the meta -- create my own narrative cycles to follow

control vs no control
dictator vs democrcy

may is mvs month

if everything is programmed, then everything is alive

the first post human world - a world of things

turn lampetides section into a live anon chat

the creation narrative can be raw code

implement a code section in which writing is created by rules and laws (if and else statements, mathematics). instructional language. this is where curses and viruses and rules and laws come from.

consider what changes in each episode, what transforms

set first 5 ch narratives in pastoral ideal
add loaded bg and fg to first person narratives

generation raised on hip hop

music is midi notation

realization of insignificance

log / consol

the code happens all at once, tge narrative undolds within a fraction of a second, it is predicted and doomed from the start
